messages.allocationsOnlyIfPaid: Cannot change status – allocations should be removed first.
messages.unallocatedAmountMustBeZero: Cannot complete – the transaction amount must be fully allocated.
messages.unallocatedAmountMustNotBeLessThanZero: The allocated amount cannot exceed the transaction amount.
messages.cannotAllocateMoreThanOnce: Cannot allocate to the same entity more than once.
messages.allocationTargetAccountMismatch: Allocation target is related to a different Account.
messages.allocationTargetSupplierMismatch: Allocation target is related to a different Supplier.
messages.allocationTargetLocalCurrencyMismatch: Allocation target has different local currency.
messages.noEditAccessToAllocationTarget: No edit access to allocation target.
messages.removedAllocationTargetIsNotOpen: Cannot remove allocation from a non-open target.
messages.removedAllocationTargetIsLocked: Cannot remove allocation from a locked target.
messages.cannotConvertWithAllocations: Cannot convert currency if payment with allocations.
messages.cannotAllocateToNonIssuedTarget: Cannot allocate to a non-issued document.
